---
title: "Download"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

- [Phenotype File](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18521355)
- [Mutation File](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18521782)
- [Gene List](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18521873)

The package also relies on annotation files. There are two types of annotation files.

- [9-annotation files]
- [96-annotation files]

Both sets of files can be downloaded at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15020658.
